small_regression_systems.name: h2o
small_regression_systems.purpose: existing CGO oracle and fast regression

origin_dependence_systems.name: benzene
origin_dependence_systems.purpose: larger spatial extent and anisotropic tensors

acceptance_notes: CGO remains the validated default until GIAO benchmarks pass.
For compact systems, CGO and GIAO should agree when the gauge origin is chosen appropriately.
For larger or more spatially extended systems, GIAO should reduce shielding changes under gauge-origin translation.
Reference comparisons should use PySCF or another trusted NMR implementation where available.
